name: Sydney
industries: Banking transformation, the Tech Central precinct and a decade-long infrastructure pipeline drive certified hiring.
intro: Sydney's project market is Australia's deepest: the banks' transformation portfolios run from Barangaroo, Tech Central is assembling the southern hemisphere's largest technology precinct, and a metro-and-motorway infrastructure pipeline keeps program roles filled for a decade ahead. Certification is priced into salaries openly — Scrum credentials for the digital delivery world, PMP for infrastructure and financial governance. Our current batches run live online on the IST schedule, which in Sydney means 1:30 PM – 10:30 PM: the final stretch runs late, so we hold this page as off-hours and say so honestly. Register interest for APAC-hours batches and you'll be first notified. The format regardless: live weekend instruction, exam application support, full-length mocks, and trainer access until you pass. Cohorts regularly include Sydney bankers, consultants and public-sector delivery leads comparing notes across sectors.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Sydney?
faq.a: Our current batches follow the Asia schedule: 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST, which converts to 01:30 PM – 10:30 PM GMT+10 in Sydney. You are welcome to join at those hours, or register interest and we will notify you first when batches in your region's hours are scheduled.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Sydney?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Sydney. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Australia?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Australia and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Sydney sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Australia accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Sydney — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Sydney: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
